meaning: Airport(英国伦敦的)希思罗机场
examples: What time do you get into Heathrow?
The plane began its descent to Heathrow.
All planes out of Heathrow have been grounded by the strikes.
Staff were available at Heathrow to help travellers rebook their flights and find hotels.
Virgin is the second-biggest airline at Heathrow airport, where landing slots are hard to acquire.
